race.description: Magic Millions National Sale Maiden Plate
race.comment: UNFAILING TRUTH (12) ran a solid race on debut here over 1100m when battling on well for fifth. She should improve off that and can give a sight back in trip. UNAPPROACHABLE (10) resumes having shown some ability in two runs last campaign. Tricky draw, watch the betting. WASAI (5) is a gelding by Exceedance on debut who can run well for the sharp yard. RED ROSE CAFE (9) has jumped out well enough for her debut and is in the mix.
